title: Rich Smoked Dutch Haddock Casserole
description: A sweet and comforting Dutch dish featuring smoked haddock, this casserole is a perfect meal for a cold evening, and is diabetic-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, grated carrot, and chopped celery to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they are tender.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked vegetable mixture, flaked smoked haddock, crushed dutch dum, low-fat milk, salt, and black pepper.
Mix the ingredients together until they are well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a terracotta dish.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
